text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the Arima Kinen has finally arrived.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While things are heating up between Triple Crown
champion Narita Brian and the "Queen of the
Amazons" Hishi Amazon...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun determinedly heads to the track
with no intention of losing to either of them.
